case_number: constitutional petition is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S-366 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 30.04.2018 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Malano Advocate for petitioner Mr. Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi DPG.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner at the very outset states the he would be satisfied and not press the instant petition, if the learned trial court is directed to undertake all possible efforts for arresting the absconding accused. The proposal advanced by learned counsel for the petitioner is not opposed by learned DPG. In view of the above, instant constitutional petition is dismissed as not pressed with direction to learned trial court to undertake all the possible efforts for arrest of absconding accused. JUDGE Rafi
